raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "High-cost payday lenders charge interest rates that can exceed 224 percent annually.",
    "Department of Defense studies have found that veterans are four times as likely to be targeted by predatory lenders.",
    "AB 539 aims to place an interest rate cap of 36 percent on all consumer loans.",
    "Currently, there is no cap on loans above $2,500, leading to extremely high interest rates for consumers.",
    "AB 539 would incentivize lenders to underwrite loans to borrowers who have a reasonable ability to repay them.",
    "There are currently 39 states that place caps on consumer loans."
  ]
}
```
